title: Alternative Piston Sounds
description: Replaces Mojang's piston sounds with new, better ones!
body:
Replaces the bad new piston sounds introduced in snapshot 24w20a with new ones, which are still quieter than the old ones, but retain some 'weight' and a mechanical feeling.

If you're looking to get the old sounds back, check out [this pack](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/old-piston-sounds) by TheOriginalGolem.
